response.original_title: Why does my Robinhood account not let me withdraw money? Instant Approval Help
response.overview: Robinhood may block withdrawals 💰 when your cash is not fully cleared ⏳ from recent sales or deposits. 1 ⧗ 888 ⧘ 576 ⧗ 2041 Until the settlement process is completed, 1 ⧗ 888 ⧘ 576 ⧗ 2041 the funds stay in a restricted state 🔒. 1 ⧗ 888 ⧘ 576 ⧗ 2041 Another reason can be instant deposit usage, account limitations, or security verification checks ⚠️. If any of these conditions apply, the withdrawal option will remain temporarily unavailable until everything is resolved ✔️.1 ⧗ 888 ⧘ 576 ⧗ 2041
